notes: v1.14.80 - Reconcile fidelity guard (roadmap P1): a Master restored from backup or quota-evicted is cab-only, so DOCUMENT RECONCILE saw 0 Master hosts and showed a misleading '✓ No mismatches' (false-CLEAN). Now when a Master is loaded but reconcile checked 0 hosts, reconcile_render shows a prominent 'Master is cab-only — reconcile NOT authoritative, re-load the source file' warning and the no-findings line drops the green ✓ for a 'limited cab-only data' note. Uses the existing res.hostCount signal (no new persisted state). The scope-picker already warned on cab-only; this closes the same gap in reconcile.
